text_preview: I HAVEM OF FRANQUILIT CAIRO'S BEACH :selected: # FORESHORE Intribute tonatures fine work of art, Foreshoreis one of the most breathtaking settings in not only Murano but in all of Ain Al Sokhna. Surrounded by the Red Sea's spectacular mountain range while resting on the water side, we took the opportunity to craft around this miraculous aspect to trigger a natural feeling of comfort. :selected: # HOT SPRING To conserve the natural beauty of the place, Hot Springs allows the flow of the natural hot stream water coming from the mountains, to run smoothly through this phase, uniting it with the landscape/pools creating a majestic feel to the atmosphere. full_text: I HAVEM OF FRANQUILIT CAIRO'S BEACH :selected: # FORESHORE Intribute tonatures fine work of art, Foreshoreis one of the most breathtaking settings in not only Murano but in all of Ain Al Sokhna. Surrounded by the Red Sea's spectacular mountain range while resting on the water side, we took the opportunity to craft around this miraculous aspect to trigger a natural feeling of comfort. :selected: # HOT SPRING To conserve the natural beauty of the place, Hot Springs allows the flow of the natural hot stream water coming from the mountains, to run smoothly through this phase, uniting it with the landscape/pools creating a majestic feel to the atmosphere.
